Actions.Text: REFERRED TO CIVIL SERVICE AND PENSIONS

Title: Authorizes Mike Hartnett to apply for military service credit in the New York city fire pension fund
Summary: Authorizes Mike Hartnett to apply for military service credit in the New York city fire pension fund for active duty service in the U.S. Army from July 7, 1964 until July 7, 1967.
ActClause: AN ACT to authorize Mike Hartnett to apply for military service credit in the New York city fire pension fund
